goal: build me a app for my browser that can control my wif air home things
lastRunSummary:
## ✅ Build Fix — Removed Empty pages/ Directory

### Root Cause
The `next build` failed with `PageNotFoundError: Cannot find module for page: /_document` during the "Collecting page data" phase. The `pages/_app.tsx` and `pages/_document.tsx` files existed as **0-byte empty files** in the workspace. Next.js 14.2 tried to load both App Router (`app/`) and Pages Router (`pages/`) simultaneously, and the empty Pages Router files caused the crash.

### Fix Applied
| File | Action | Reason |
|------|--------|--------|
| `pages/_app.tsx` | **Deleted** | Not needed — App Router uses `app/layout.tsx` |
| `pages/_document.tsx` | **Deleted** | Not needed — App Router uses `app/layout.tsx` |

This project uses the **App Router exclusively**, so the Pages Router files were unnecessary and causing the build crash.

### Deliverables
| Artifact | URL |
|----------|------|
| **GitHub repo** | https://github.com/Goatkenziee/home-control-app |
| **Latest commit** | `efb76bc` — Remove empty pages/ directory |
| **Code** | 19 files in workspace (Code tab) |

### 🚧 Vercel Deploy Still Blocked
Vercel integration token is not configured. The repo is ready to deploy — connect Vercel to the GitHub repo and it should build clean.
